summary: Zero games analyzed. 2026-07-15 was the day after the MLB All-Star Game (the second and final off-day of All-Star week before regular season resumes); no regular-season games were scheduled. The pipeline produced no picks_2026-07-15_diag.csv, no claude_picks file, and the results file confirms an empty games array. No wins, no losses, no hit rate to report. No new patterns can be derived from a zero-game slate. Carry forward all patterns from the 2026-07-11 postgame (last regular-season slate) unchanged into the next regular-season Claude Brain run.
